name: Show Subclasses
title: Show Subclasses
description: Show all direct subclasses of the selected class
queryText:
LET node = DOCUMENT(@startNode)
FOR child, edge IN 1..1 INBOUND node subClassOf
  RETURN child

name: Show Parent Classes
title: Show Parent Classes
description: Show the parent class(es) of the selected class
queryText:
LET node = DOCUMENT(@startNode)
FOR parent, edge IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node subClassOf
  RETURN parent

name: Show Full Subtree
title: Show Full Subtree
description: Expand the complete subtree of descendants below the selected class
queryText:
LET node = DOCUMENT(@startNode)
FOR v, e, p IN 0..5 INBOUND node subClassOf
  RETURN DISTINCT v

name: Show Path to Root
title: Show Path to Root
description: Trace the full inheritance chain from the selected class up to the root ancestor
queryText:
LET node = DOCUMENT(@startNode)
FOR v, e, p IN 0..10 OUTBOUND node subClassOf
  RETURN DISTINCT v

name: Show Classified Assets
title: Show Classified Assets
description: Show devices and software classified as the selected class (via type edges)
queryText:
LET node = DOCUMENT(@startNode)
FOR asset, edge IN 1..1 INBOUND node type
  RETURN asset

name: Show Same Category
title: Show Same Category
description: Show all classes in the same category as the selected class
queryText:
LET node = DOCUMENT(@startNode)
FOR c IN Class
  FILTER c.category == node.category
  RETURN c
